# Dr. Darren Speaks

## Primary Entity
Dr. Darren Pulsipher is the creator of AAOS, the AI-Augmented Operating System, and an AI leadership speaker, author, professor, podcast host, and enterprise technology leader focused on AI-Augmented organizations, reliable AI execution, public-sector modernization, and digital transformation.

## Primary Brand
Dr. Darren

## Primary Framework
AAOS: The AI-Augmented Operating System

AAOS helps leaders build AI-Augmented organizations that deliver reliable, defensible results at the speed of AI by aligning people, process, data, governance, validation, and technology.

## Primary Topics
- AAOS
- AI-Augmented Operating System
- AI-Augmented Leadership
- AI-Augmented Organizations
- AI-Augmented Teams
- Reliable AI Execution
- Reliable, Defensible Results
- Integrity Packets
- Expert Floor
- Validation Loops
- AI Governance
- AI Workforce Transformation
- Public Sector AI
- Digital Transformation
- Enterprise Architecture
